This field indicates if alcohol dependency is a risk factor, either present or past, likely to affect the patient's current health status and/or outcome. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1036_RSK_DRUGS M1036 (M0290) High Risk Factor- Drug Dependency This field indicates if drug dependency is a risk factor, either present or past, likely to affect the patient's current health status and/or outcome. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1036_RSK_NONE M1036
